x-enumeration-literals.name: Custodian
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The party that safekeeps and administers assets on behalf of the owner.
https://www.iso20022.org/standardsrepository/type/CustodianRole

A financial institution that holds customers' securities for safekeeping to prevent them from being stolen or lost.
https://www.investopedia.com/terms/c/custodian.asp
